title: polygala triflora
intro: Polygala triflora, also known as Yin Yang Huo, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Polygala triflora are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular function, and enhancing immune system function. Traditional herbal preparations include tea, capsules, and decoctions, which are often used in combination with other herbs to maximize their therapeutic effects.
